description: Machine-readable index of all verified tools in this library. Agents: load this file first, find relevant tools by category/tags, then fetch only the specific script needed.

tools.description: List all MRML nodes in the current scene with index, class, and name
tools.usage: Run inside Slicer Python environment; optionally pass a save_path to write output to disk

tools.description: Download and load the MRHead sample volume from Slicer's built-in SampleData module
tools.usage: Run inside Slicer Python environment (headless or GUI)

tools.description: Enable volume rendering on a loaded scalar volume with a named preset (MR-Default, CT-Bone, etc.)
tools.usage: Run inside Slicer Python environment; requires a loaded volume node

tools.description: Capture and save the 3D view widget as a PNG screenshot
tools.usage: Run inside Slicer Python environment; pass output_path to set destination

tools.description: Register two fiducial point sets using SlicerIGT FiducialRegistrationWizard; returns 4x4 rigid transform and RMS error
tools.usage: Requires SlicerIGT installed; call run_fiducial_registration(nodeA, nodeB)

tools.description: Install Slicer extensions via built-in extension manager wizard; auto-restarts Slicer when done
tools.usage: Edit EXTENSIONS_TO_INSTALL list then run in GUI mode: DISPLAY=:1 Slicer --python-script install-extension.py

tools.description: Shell launcher: run a Python script in Slicer with optional GUI or headless mode
tools.usage: ./run-slicer-script.sh <script.py> [--headless]; set SLICER_BIN at top of file

tools.description: Verify a named scripted module was registered by Slicer's factory manager; prints SUCCESS/FAIL
tools.usage: Set MODULE_NAME, run headless: DISPLAY=:1 Slicer --additional-module-paths /path --no-main-window --python-script check-module-registered.py

tools.description: Switch to a named Slicer module and capture the main window as a PNG for UI verification
tools.usage: Set MODULE_NAME and OUTPUT_PATH, run with GUI: DISPLAY=:1 Slicer --additional-module-paths /path --python-script screenshot-module.py

tools.description: Slicer automation patterns: restart loop guard, two-phase script, permanent module registration via revisionUserSettings, extensionsManagerModel headless hang
tools.usage: Reference while writing any Slicer automation, installation, or module registration script
